$comment: Single source of truth for the required shape of every on-disk state object the simplicio-loop converge/drain mechanism reads or writes. scripts/check_loop_contract.py loads this file and cross-checks every fixture's structural shape against it before running the per-fixture semantic assertions in each fixture's expected.json. Consumers (e.g. simplicio-runtime) should treat this file, not prose, as the field-level contract.

scratchpad_frontmatter.format: markdown with a --- delimited YAML-ish frontmatter block (key: value per line) followed by the free-text goal body
scratchpad_frontmatter.producer: the agent/skill, written once when the loop is armed; iteration is rewritten in place by hooks/loop_stop.py on every re-feed

field_types.max_iterations: integer >= 0, as text (0 = scheduler-controlled, no cap)
field_types.completion_promise: quoted exact string, or the literal null

journal_record.format: append-only JSON Lines — one JSON object per line, never rewritten, only appended
journal_record.producer: scripts/loop_journal.py record (and a fallback auto-record from hooks/loop_stop.py when the agent forgot to)

field_types.fingerprint: 12-hex-char stable hash of the failure signature, or empty string when gate == pass
field_types.execution_state: enum: proposed | planned | dry_run | authorized | executed | verified | rejected

invariants: iteration values are non-decreasing top to bottom
the SAME underlying failure always fingerprints to the SAME value, even when line numbers / hex addresses / timestamps / durations differ between occurrences (scripts/loop_journal.py:fingerprint)
no verb in scripts/loop_journal.py's CLI ever opens the file in a mode other than append ('a')

anchor.format: single JSON object, overwritten in place by scripts/task_anchor.py (frozen at intake, then per-criterion status updates)
invariants: a promise is honored only when every criterion.status == done (hooks/loop_stop.py:anchor_pending)

watcher_challenge.format: single JSON object, overwritten each re-feed
watcher_challenge.producer: hooks/loop_stop.py:write_watcher_challenge, at the END of a turn that re-feeds (before the next turn's agent acts)

watcher_state.producer: scripts/watcher_verify.py verify (a separate, independent re-computation of the anchor's done/pending state — must NOT trust anything the calling agent asserts)
invariants: a receipt is accepted only when match == true AND status == 'MEASURED' AND challenge == the CURRENT watcher_challenge.json's challenge AND (no goal_fp expected, or goal_fp matches) AND checked_at >= written_at (hooks/loop_stop.py:watcher_verify)

done_flag.producer: hooks/loop_capture.py on runtimes with a separate post-response hook (e.g. Cursor); on Claude Code this is folded into hooks/loop_stop.py directly instead

stop_signal.format: any file (content is not parsed — presence is the signal)
stop_signal.producer: a human or an external channel command
invariants: checked BEFORE the promise/evidence/anchor/cap/spindle gates — STOP always wins, in either mode
if scratchpad meta existed when STOP fired, a HANDOFF.md is written first — a STOPped loop is always an INCOMPLETE stop

handoff.format: free-text markdown (not JSON) — frozen goal, per-criterion checklist, last journal attempts, resume steps
handoff.producer: hooks/loop_stop.py:write_handoff, called only on an INCOMPLETE stop (STOP signal, max_iterations cap, spindle handoff, missing bound operator) — never on a fulfilled promise

drain_queue_state.path: runtime-defined (this contract does not mandate a path — no code in this repo persists this shape yet; see notes below)
drain_queue_state.status: REFERENCE ONLY — target shape for a drain executor to implement, not an extraction from running code in this repo. The 24/7 standing loop's actual scheduler tick is host-provided (cron / durable scheduler); only its termination RULE is documented today (.claude/skills/simplicio-loop/SKILL.md § Two loop modes, .claude/skills/simplicio-loop/references/standing-loop-247.md § 3).
invariants: a round is 'dry' iff claimed == [] AND in_flight == [] for that round
DRAINED iff the trailing dry-round streak >= k (K consecutive empty rounds, dry>=2 per the documented default)
DRAINED is an idle state, not a termination: 'idle when drained, wake on any new item/comment/check' (standing-loop-247.md)
